title: neanotis subtilis
intro: Neanotis subtilis, also known as Indian turmeric or wild turmeric, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Neanotis subtilis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is valued for its ability to promote wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation.
